---
title: "The Gospel according to Saint John, after the Authorized Version Newly compared with the original Greek and revised by five Clergymen."
---

## The Gospel according to Saint John, after the Authorized Version Newly compared with the original Greek and revised by five Clergymen.
**Date:** 1857
**Imprint:** London: Parker

### Notes

George Moberly was one of the five clergymen.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
